title: Selaila Veedu Kattava Lyrics Aval Varuvala
stanzas:

<div>
Selaila Veedu Kattava Lyrics Aval Varuvala

Selaiyila veedu kattavaa
serndhu vasikka.
janna vachcha jacket
podava thendral adikka

mookkuthiyin minnal
oru deepan yetrivaithu poga
sokkukindra vetkam
vandhu vannam kolam
ondru poda.

Selaiyila veedu kattavaa
serndhu vasikka.
janna vachcha jacket
podava thendral adikka

thavani nazhuvinaal
idhayamum nazhuvuthe
asanthathum un vizhi
azhaginai thiruduthe (2)

oaviyathai thirai maraivil
olithu vaipathaenammaa
katru mazhi chaaralile
nanaiyavittaal niyaayamaa

rasikka vandha
rasiganin vizhigalil moodathe
vizhiyai moodum podhilum
viralgalaale thedaathe.

Selaiyila veedu kattavaa
serndhu vasikka.
janna vachcha jacket
podava thendral adikka

manmadhan sannidhi
mudhan murai paarkiren
athanaal thaanadi
paniyilum verkiren (2)

muththangalin osaigale
poojai mani aanathe.
sevvidhazhin eerangale
theertham endru thonuthe.

kaala neram enbathu
kadhalil illaiyaa
kaama dhevan koyilil
gadikarangal thevaiyaa

Selaiyila veedu kattavaa
serndhu vasikka.
janna vachcha jacket
podava thendral adikka

mookkuthiyin minnal
oru deepan yetrivaithu poga
sokkukindra vetkam
vandhu vannam kolam
ondru poda.

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song?

The song expresses themes of love and longing, highlighting the emotional struggles of the protagonist.

What is the context of the song in the movie?

In Aval Varuvala, the song reflects the protagonist's feelings towards their love interest, enhancing the romantic narrative.

Who is the singer and music director of this song?

The singer and music director for Selaila Veedu Kattava are currently unknown.

When was the song released?

The song was released on May 15, 1998.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In Selaila Veedu Kattava, the protagonist expresses deep emotions of love and yearning, encapsulating the essence of romance. The song plays a pivotal role in Aval Varuvala, enhancing the narrative with its poignant lyrics and melody. It evokes feelings of nostalgia and longing, making it relatable to anyone who has experienced love. The soothing tune and heartfelt expressions create a memorable listening experience.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Selaila Veedu Kattava from the movie Aval Varuvala captures the essence of longing and romance with its heartfelt lyrics. The song's soothing melody resonates deeply, making it a timeless favorite for lovers. Experience the emotional journey as the song beautifully conveys the complexities of love and desire.
stanzaMeanings: Selaila Veedu Kattava Lyrics Aval Varuvala
The house is built in the fields, and the cool breeze is blowing as I wear my jacket.
A lightning from the nose is like a lamp, and the feeling of shame comes like a color in the sky.
I am not able to give myself to you.
The house is built in the fields, and the cool breeze is blowing as I wear my jacket.
With the pain of separation, my heart is also aching, and your beautiful eyes are stealing my peace.
I have placed the painting in the movie frame, and if I get lost in the rain, is it fair?
Don't close your eyes in the gaze of the admirer who has come to enjoy; don't hide your eyes in the light.
The house is built in the fields, and the cool breeze is blowing as I wear my jacket.
I see the presence of love, and because of that, I am also working hard.
The sounds of the pearls are like a worship bell. The tears of the devotees are considered holy water.
Is there no time in love? Is there a need for rituals in the temple of desire?
The house is built in the fields, and the cool breeze is blowing as I wear my jacket.
A lightning from the nose is like a lamp, and the feeling of shame comes like a color in the sky.
I am not able to give myself to you.
